_comment: Paste these entries into your gool/config.json 'buses' array to wire up DialogueDirector. The Dialogue bus drives sidechain ducking on Music, LocalSfx, and RemoteSfx so callouts cut through gunfire and the soundtrack — the L4D2 mix signature. If you already have buses named Music/LocalSfx/RemoteSfx with compressors, ADD a second compressor entry on each one with sidechain_bus='Dialogue' rather than replacing the existing one. See docs/audio_design/dialogue_setup.md for the full explanation.
